title: fix(deps): update module github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2 to v2.3.2
body:

| [github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit) | `v2.3.1` -> `v2.3.2` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit%2fv2/v2.3.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit%2fv2/v2.3.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit%2fv2/v2.3.1/v2.3.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit%2fv2/v2.3.1/v2.3.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rootless-containers/rootlesskit (github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2)</summary>

### [`v2.3.2`](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/tag/v2.3.2)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/compare/v2.3.1...v2.3.2)

##### Changes

-   pasta: Support passt >= 2024\_10\_30.ee7d0b6 ([#​482](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/482))
-   port/builtin: fix specifying an IP address to listen on ([#​477](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/477), thanks to [@​haytok](https://redirect.github.com/haytok))

Full changes: https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/milestone/12?closed=1
Thanks to [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) [@​haytok](https://redirect.github.com/haytok) [@​sbrivio-rh](https://redirect.github.com/sbrivio-rh)

##### Install

    mkdir -p ~/bin
    curl -sSL https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/download//rootlesskit-$(uname -m).tar.gz | tar Cxzv ~/bin

##### About the binaries

The binaries were built automatically on GitHub Actions.
See the log to verify SHA256SUMS.
https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/actions/runs/12859680457
The sha256sum of the SHA256SUMS file itself is 260f7ccbfc1b4b0550622f18dc87b1193ef4618abf34521c852f6dbdb6612fdd .

</details>
